sections.text: We’re a group of friends in the GTA, born and raised in India, and cricket has always been part of our heritage and our DNA.
We grew up playing wherever we could find space, school grounds, streets, empty lots, early mornings, late evenings. Those moments shaped our love for the game and the friendships that came with it.
Years later, life brought us to Canada, but the passion never changed. The same energy, the same competitive spirit, and the same excitement of stepping onto the field together still drive us today.

GJ Titans is our way of carrying those roots forward, playing the game we grew up with, building a community around it, and enjoying every moment on the field. We play hard, respect the game, and value the brotherhood it creates.
